message:
fix(tests): correct Cohere reasoning assertion for command-r-plus model

The per-model reasoning detection (commit 0189ed48) correctly identifies
command-r-plus as non-reasoning (command-a is the reasoning line), but
the test expectation was not updated. Fix assertion to match the new
model-level reasoning detection logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
